HGSS.584.0000:
Welcome to the Goldenrod
Department Store.
HGSS.584.0001:
The department store has a
decent selection.\f
But some items are only available
as Game Corner prizes.
HGSS.584.0002:
What kind of business would a
Team Rocket member have here?\f
We aren’t selling sanity here.
HGSS.584.0003: I’m raring to shop again today!
HGSS.584.0004:
Be it Team Rocket, “Team Pocket,” or
whatever...leave me alone!\f
I’m busy shopping and have no time
to waste!
HGSS.584.0005:
Mom’s good at bargain hunting.\f
She always buys stuff at lower prices.
HGSS.584.0006:
Mom told me to stay away from
people in black suits.
